extDescription: Know what's exposed. Stop it before it leaves.
category_myMoney_desc: Cards, bank accounts, and payment details
category_myHealth_desc: Health cards, medical records, and conditions
category_myDigitalLife_desc: Passwords, API keys, and private credentials
category_myLocation_desc: Home address, GPS coordinates, and travel plans
tier_free_limitReached: You've reached your free plan limit.
scan_dropPrompt: Drop a file here or click to browse
scan_privacy: This file stays on your device. Nothing is uploaded.
settings_protections_desc: Turn off any category you don't want ShieldMe to watch.
settings_advanced_desc: Fine-tune which specific items are watched within each category.
settings_apiConnections_desc: Connect your own accounts to unlock extra checks. Keys are stored on your device only.
settings_api_hibp_desc: Check if your email appeared in a known data breach. Requires your own free API key.
settings_api_deleteMe_desc: Automate removal requests from people-search sites.
settings_api_keyStored: Key saved. Stored on your device only.
detector_usBank: US bank routing and account numbers
detector_minorName: Children's names with age or school
detector_schoolInfo: School name and year group combos
onboarding_presetPicker_title: Tell us about you — we'll turn on the right protections.
preset_default_global_desc: The basics everyone needs — cards, IDs, passwords, and credentials.
preset_life_parent_desc: Watches for your children's names, school details, and family address blocks.
preset_life_privacymax_desc: Every detector turned on — for people who want the strongest protection available.
preset_life_traveler_desc: Flags passport numbers, travel itineraries, and location coordinates in your files.
preset_radar_essentials_desc: Checks your email and passwords against known data breaches.
preset_region_eu_desc: Adds EU-specific checks: IBAN, national IDs, and country-specific health cards.
preset_region_traveler_desc: Scans for documents from multiple countries — good if you travel frequently.
preset_residency_au_desc: Tailored for Australian residents: Medicare number, tax file number, and driver's licence.
preset_residency_ca_desc: Tailored for Canadian residents: SIN, provincial health cards, and Canadian IDs.
preset_residency_de_desc: Tailored for German residents: tax ID, health insurance number, and German identity card.
preset_residency_es_desc: Tailored for Spanish residents: DNI, NIE, and Spanish health cards.
preset_residency_fr_desc: Tailored for French residents: national ID, social security number, and health certificate.
preset_residency_gr_desc: Tailored for Greek residents: AMKA, AFM tax number, and Greek ID card.
preset_residency_it_desc: Tailored for Italian residents: codice fiscale, health card, and passport.
preset_residency_jp_desc: Tailored for Japanese residents: My Number, driver's licence, and passport.
preset_residency_nl_desc: Tailored for Dutch residents: BSN, health cards, and driving licence.
preset_residency_pt_desc: Tailored for Portuguese residents: NIF, NIS, and citizen card number.
preset_residency_uk_desc: Tailored for UK residents: National Insurance number, NHS number, and passport.
preset_residency_us_desc: Tailored for US residents: Social Security Number, bank details, and driving licence.
preset_work_developer_desc: Scans code and config for API keys, private keys, and credentials left in files.
preset_work_healthcare_desc: Watches for health card numbers, medical record references, and patient-identifying details.
preset_work_payments_desc: Focuses on card numbers, bank accounts, and payment credentials that could cause fraud.
